title: oenothera brandegeei
intro: Oenothera brandegeei, also known as Brandegee's evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its high levels of omega-6 fatty acids and other nutrients, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve heart health, and support the immune system. Oenothera brandegeei can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
